title: DSCI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 34 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Delhi State Cancer Institutes (DSCI) have officially released the notification to fill the vacancies for 34 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, MD/MS, DNB, Post-graduation, or diploma can apply for the DSCI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk -in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limi...
